summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of JIS Terraplanagem institutional website. All major functionalities working correctly including WhatsApp integrations, navigation, and contact form.

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile menu toggle button not visible in testing viewport (390x844) - may be CSS issue with lg:hidden class or viewport detection

integration_issues.issue: Emergent badge overlay occasionally interferes with floating WhatsApp button clicks

passed_tests: All page sections load properly (Header, Hero, About, Services, Portfolio, Equipment, Contact, Footer)
Header navigation links work with smooth scrolling to correct sections
Header CTA button opens WhatsApp with correct number (5534999291289)
Hero section displays correctly with proper content and CTA buttons
Hero Solicitar Orçamento and Falar no WhatsApp buttons open WhatsApp
About section shows correct statistics (200+ clients, 100 mil+ m² paved, 15+ years)
Services section displays 4 service cards (Topografia, Terraplanagem, Pavimentação, Barragens)
Service Solicitar Orçamento buttons open WhatsApp with service-specific messages
Portfolio section displays 4 project cards properly
Equipment section shows 6 equipment items correctly
Contact form validation works (shows required field errors)
Contact form fields can be filled and selected properly
Contact form Submit button triggers WhatsApp with form data
WhatsApp floating button positioned correctly in bottom right
Footer displays correctly with company information
Smooth scroll navigation between sections works
All WhatsApp integrations use correct number (5534999291289)
Contact form redirects to WhatsApp instead of sending email as expected
